meta.summary: TAFFISH first-party command-line client for UniProt ID Mapping REST API jobs.
meta.description: TAFFISH first-party command-line client for UniProt ID Mapping REST API jobs.

test: uniprot-idmapping --help | grep -F 'UniProt ID Mapping REST API' >/dev/null && uniprot-idmapping --help | grep -F -- '--input' >/dev/null && uniprot-idmapping --help | grep -F -- '--fields' >/dev/null

uniprot-idmapping --info fields | grep -F 'accession' >/dev/null && uniprot-idmapping --info fields | grep -F 'organism_name' >/dev/null && uniprot-idmapping --info databases | grep -Fx 'UniProtKB_AC-ID' >/dev/null && uniprot-idmapping --info databases | grep -Fx 'UniParc' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-uniprot-idmapping-smoke-$$; portfile=${tmp}.port; rm -rf "$tmp" "$portfile"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python3 /opt/uniprot-idmapping/tests/mock_uniprot_server.py "$portfile" & pid=$!; trap 'kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf "$tmp" "$portfile"' EXIT; i=0; while [ ! -s "$portfile" ]; do i=$((i + 1)); if [ "$i" -gt 50 ]; then exit 1; fi; sleep 0.1; done; cd "$tmp" && printf 'P00720\n' > ids.txt && uniprot-idmapping --base-url "http://127.0.0.1:$(cat "$portfile")" --input ids.txt --output out.csv --task query --from UniProtKB_AC-ID --to UniProtKB --fields accession,id,gene_names --stream True --metadata-output metadata.json && test -s out.csv && test -s metadata.json && grep -F 'P00720' out.csv >/dev/null && grep -F 'TAF_MOCK' metadata.json >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-uniprot-idmapping-page-smoke-$$; portfile=${tmp}.port; rm -rf "$tmp" "$portfile"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; python3 /opt/uniprot-idmapping/tests/mock_uniprot_server.py "$portfile" & pid=$!; trap 'kill "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; wait "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -rf "$tmp" "$portfile"' EXIT; i=0; while [ ! -s "$portfile" ]; do i=$((i + 1)); if [ "$i" -gt 50 ]; then exit 1; fi; sleep 0.1; done; cd "$tmp" && printf 'P00720\n' > ids.txt && uniprot-idmapping --base-url "http://127.0.0.1:$(cat "$portfile")" -i ids.txt -o out.csv --task mapping --from UniProtKB_AC-ID --to UniProtKB --stream False --size 1 && test -s out.csv && grep -F 'LYSC_CHICK' out.csv >/dev/null

upstream.name: TAFFISH UniProt ID Mapping client
upstream.citation: The UniProt Consortium 2025; UniProt website API 2025
